message.content:
Let me fix the mult/multu carry bug and rerun:

{
  "analysis": "Found the bug: mult/multu carry computation can be up to 2, not just 0/1. Need to use BigInt for multiply. Let me fix this critical bug.",
  "plan": "Rewrite the multiply instructions to use BigInt for correctness.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '/case 24:/,/case 25:/{p}' /app/vm.js
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import re
with open('/app/vm.js','r') as f:
    code = f.read()

# Replace case 24 (mult)
old24 = '''case 24:{const a=R[rs]|0,b=R[rt]|0,neg=(a^b)<0,aa=Math.abs(a),bb=Math.abs(b);const aL=aa&0xffff,aH=aa>>>16,bL=bb&0xffff,bH=bb>>>16,p0=aL*bL,p1=aL*bH,p2=aH*bL,p3=aH*bH;let l=(p0+((p1&0xffff)<<16)+((p2&0xffff)<<16))>>>0;let h=(p3+(p1>>>16)+(p2>>>16)+(((p0>>>0)+(((p1&0xffff)<<16)>>>0)+(((p2&0xffff)<<16)>>>0)>=4294967296)?1:0))>>>0;if(neg){l=(~l+1)>>>0;h=(~h+(l===0?1:0))>>>0}lo=l;hi=h;break}'''
new24 = '''case 24:{const r=BigInt(R[rs]|0)*BigInt(R[rt]|0);lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;break}'''
code = code.replace(old24, new24)

# Replace case 25 (multu)
old25 = '''case 25:{const a=R[rs],b=R[rt],aL=a&0xffff,aH=a>>>16,bL=b&0xffff,bH=b>>>16,p0=aL*bL,p1=aL*bH,p2=aH*bL,p3=aH*bH;lo=(p0+((p1&0xffff)<<16)+((p2&0xffff)<<16))>>>0;hi=(p3+(p1>>>16)+(p2>>>16)+(((p0>>>0)+(((p1&0xffff)<<16)>>>0)+(((p2&0xffff)<<16)>>>0)>=4294967296)?1:0))>>>0;break}'''
new25 = '''case 25:{const r=BigInt(R[rs]>>>0)*BigInt(R[rt]>>>0);lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;break}'''
code = code.replace(old25, new25)

with open('/app/vm.js','w') as f:
    f.write(code)
print('Done')
"
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ]
}
